notes: Supplier identifiers are represented as strings to preserve leading zeros.
The source row order is preserved as risk rank.
The amount fields reconcile to the supplier performance summary totals.
favorableDeliveryRatePercent and secondaryPerformanceRatePercent are provisional source-derived labels and should be confirmed against the source SQL.
maximumDaysOverdue is null for suppliers without overdue schedule lines.
The response contains the complete ranking in one page; production APIs should apply server-side pagination.
